name: Anubis, God of Funeary
description:
[art by hyaku1063] Anubis was one of the most important gods in Ancient Egyptian history. People viewed him with respect as a god of the underworld. Anubis is often depicted holding a crook and flail, symbolizing authority. He was seen as the primary god associated with death during the Old Kingdom until the 4th Dynasty. Anubis then replaced him as the main god of death and resurrection.

Thousands of years later, he has now been revived and still remains in Egypt, attempting to modern day times.
creator: Fluffymon
